name: The Curse of Beatriz
short_description: Your parents are out celebrating their wedding anniversary. Alone at home, you decide to test the legend of Beatriz, a spirit that haunts those who summon her in front of the bathroom mirror. What seemed like just a joke soon turns into a terrifying nightmare.
detailed_description:
Ethan's parents have gone out to celebrate their wedding anniversary, leaving him home alone. Curious and influenced by a viral video, he decides to test the legend of Beatriz, a cursed spirit that can be summoned in front of the bathroom mirror by repeating the phrase:

"Beatriz, you damned." And then "Now show yourself, you damned."

It is said that Beatriz was possessed and, unable to resist the curse, took her own life in front of the mirror. Since then, those who insult her are haunted by her presence. What begins as simple curiosity quickly becomes a fight for survival.

Explore every corner of the house in search of essential items to perform the reversal ritual. But be careful — reality is distorted, and Beatriz's presence is growing stronger. Can you undo the curse before it's too late?

Key Features:

  • Immersive Environment

  • Item-Based Progression: Find and use key objects to advance the story.

⚠️ Warning: This game contains flashing lights that may be problematic for sensitive individuals.

A little more

Ethan's family lives in an old house located on a road, with a dense forest just ahead. The legend of Beatriz had been known for decades, but gained strength after a video became popular on the internet. Many have tried to summon her — few remember what happened.

David and Rose, Ethan's parents, are skeptical and protective. They do not believe in urban legends and have always forbidden their son from getting involved with these stories. However, with his parents away to celebrate their wedding anniversary, Ethan decides to take advantage of the freedom to test the legend for himself — without imagining the consequences of his actions. Even at only 13 years old, he had the courage to do so.
